post.headline: Check who you are contacting before you send a tip
post.subtext: The verified directory helps sources find a trusted recipient and confirm they reached the right person.
post.image_alt_text: Social graphic showing a desktop view of Hush Line's Whistleblower Support Directory with the Verified tab open. A search bar appears above a note explaining that verified accounts have confirmed their identities with staff, and a public profile card is visible below.

social.bluesky: Hush Line's verified directory helps sources check public trust signals before they send a tip. You can review verified profiles, find the right recipient, and send a message without making an account.
social.linkedin:
Before you send a tip, it helps to know who is on the other end.

Hush Line's verified directory gives sources a clearer way to check public trust signals and find the right recipient. You can browse verified profiles first, then decide where to send your message. No sender account is required.
social.mastodon: Before sending a tip, sources should be able to check who they are contacting. Hush Line's verified directory helps people review public trust signals, find the right recipient, and send a message without creating an account.

post.rationale: This screenshot reflects same-day shipped work in the guest screenshot flow and highlights a core Hush Line need: helping sources verify they reached the right recipient before sharing sensitive information. It is public-facing, above the fold, non-empty, light theme, and strong for LinkedIn because the message is immediately legible without admin context.
post.copy_brief: Write for sources and public users evaluating or using Hush Line.

matched_pull_requests.title: Fix guest profile screenshot manifest reset logic

post.title: Directory - Verified

summary: Feature the verified public directory so sources can check trust signals before they send a tip.
